name: Manganese Nodule Geochemical Analysis
description: Dataset containing geochemical analysis of manganese nodules, including elemental composition (Al, Si, Ca, Mn, Fe, Co, Ni, Cu, Zn, Ba, Sc, Sb, La, Ce, Nd, Sm, Eu, Tb, Ho, Yb, Lu, Hf, Th, U), sample metadata (Event, Latitude, Longitude, Elevation, ID, Deposit type, Depth sed, Distance, Samp type), and temporal information (Date/Time).
